summary: Projected ~17.3M passengers for Presidents' Day week Feb 16-22, 2026 based on 2025 base of 16.86M with ~3% YoY growth
content: Base: 2025 Presidents' Day week (Feb 17-23) = 16,864,328. 2024 equivalent = 16,712,712. Recent 2026 YoY growth: 2.4% (regular week), 4-5% (pre-holiday days). DHS shutdown ongoing but minimal impact (TSA works, FAA unaffected). Distribution: P10=16.68M, P50=17.31M, P90=17.73M.
